main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'rehumectación incompleta y propilenglicol' matches anchors

key_signals.justification: C2: 8+ signals: 5 meses, aclarado 30min, rampa 2min, caudal 36%, P 64, dP bajos, mejora

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (desecacion, biofouling, scaling) - primera es subtipo, mas estrecho

recommended_action.justification: C4: 20% presion 12-24h + rampa 30 min - matches gold sin CIP

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: PG no detectable + 24h sin recuperacion + dP en aumento -> daño
